title: Section 62A Planning Application: S62A/2024/0075 Land North of Thaxted Road, Saffron Walden
body: "Type of application: Approval of reserved matters following outline approval  Applicant name Melanie Summer (Saffron Walden LLP)  Site address: Land North of Thaxted Road, Saffron Walden  Description of proposed development Reserved matters (|appearance, landscaping, layout and scale); pursuant to outline planning permission ref: S62A/2023/0031 for the erection of up to 55 dwellings, associated landscaping and open space, with access from Knight Park.  Case Officer Section 62A Applications Team  Procedure Written Representations  Key dates      Date     Date application valid 21 January 2025   Date by when representations must be made 14 March 2025   Hearing date and venue NA   Target decision 20 May 2025   Decision date 19 May 2025     Decision   Decision Notice and Statement of Reasons  (PDF, 219 KB, 15 pages)   Make a representation  The application can be inspected under the application plans and documents heading below.  You will be able to comment on this application until 14 March 2025.   Please base your comments on planning matters.  Please avoid the use of inflammatory, discriminatory or abusive comments  All representations made in connection with the development proposal will be made publicly available on the website shortly after the end of the representation period.  The name of the individual author or organisation will be published however addresses, signatures and contact details will not be published.  We advise you not to include any other personal information about yourself or others.   Our Customer Privacy Notice sets out how we handle personal data in accordance with the law.  Send your comments via email to section62a@planninginspectorate.gov.uk  or write to  Section 62A Applications Team,Planning Inspectorate,3rd Floor, Temple Quay House,2 The Square, Temple Quay,Bristol,BS1 6PN   Sending comments by email will enable us to deal with them more quickly.  Please include the application reference number S62A/2024/0075 and site address.  This application will be determined by an Inspector appointed by the Secretary of State.  Shortly after the close of the representation period the Planning Inspectorate will consider whether a hearing is necessary.   In the event that a hearing is scheduled, and you would wish to speak at the hearing, you must make this request at the time you submit your written representations.  Where the application is to be considered at a hearing, notice of the date, time and venue for the hearing along with the name of the person holding the hearing, will be published on this website at least two weeks before the date of the hearing.    Application Plans and Documents   Application Form with back page  (PDF, 690 KB, 5 pages)  Cover letter  (PDF, 123 KB, 1 page)  24.1966.0001A - Land N.E.Thaxted Road Saffron Walden - As Existing Site Location Plan  (PDF, 504 KB, 1 page)  24.1966.0002B - Land N.E.Thaxted Road Saffron Walden - As Existing Site Block Plan  (PDF, 1.57 MB, 1 page)  24.1966.1000S - Land N.E.Thaxted Road Saffron Walden - Proposed Site Layout  (PDF, 1.77 MB, 1 page)  24.1966.1001E - Land N.E.Thaxted Road Saffron Walden - Proposed Coloured Site Layout  (PDF, 3.55 MB, 1 page)  24.1966.2000B - Land N.E.Thaxted Road Saffron_Walden_-_Proposed_Parking_Layout_Plan  (PDF, 2.15 MB, 1 page)  24.1966.2050B_-_Land_N.E.Thaxted_Road__Saffron_Walden_-_Proposed_Storey_Heights_Plan  (PDF, 1.97 MB, 1 page)  24.1966.2100B_-_Land_N.E.Thaxted_Road__Saffron_Walden_-_Proposed_Housing_Tenure_Plan  (PDF,...
